commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Windows Scheduled Task launch verification to snapshot pre-existing listener PIDs, ignore them as launch evidence, terminate them before Startup fallback, and add startup-fallback regression tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +56. Total +95 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can treat a foreground listener as Scheduled Task launch evidence and skip fallback. I did not run a native Windows Scheduled Task reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can split launch-evidence filtering from killable gateway cleanup and add the missing unrelated-listener regression; native Windows proof can follow.
